# AdwaitaMono Nerd Font

This repository includes AdwaitaMono Nerd Font from Nerd Fonts.

Source:
https://github.com/ryanoasis/nerd-fonts/releases/download/v3.4.0/AdwaitaMono.zip

Nerd Fonts project:
https://github.com/ryanoasis/nerd-fonts

License:
SIL Open Font License 1.1

Adwaita Mono is derived from the GNOME Adwaita Fonts project.
